race.comment: FAST HARRY (7) built through the grades last campaign before a 1.2L before the break. His two trials this time in have been very impressive behind subsequent G3 winner Western Empire. Pike rides first-up and he profiles like a Group winner in waiting. Can return with a bang. HOT AND HIGH (3) is clearly the main danger, remaining unbeaten first-up with a 0.5L victory over 1200m a fortnight ago. Nottle rides now and her 2kg claim comes in handy. Should have the tactical advantage over FAST HARRY and will be hard to catch with improvement on the cards second-up. TIMELESS GEM (4) comes back to 1300m today after a 1.6L defeat at Ascot most recently. That was a good return to form and this shapes similarly. Can't be left out of calculations. SHMOOV MOOVA (5) is third-up now and looks suited by the rise in trip today. Not out of this. NICCIANA (9) can improve on the fresh run and won't be far away.
